title: BetterTeamsGUI 2.4
body:
## Features
 - ✔ Team Viewer
 - ✔ Sound Effect
 - ✔ Easy Member Management
 - ✔ Full Customizable & User-Friendly
 - ✔ Ally/Invites Request Inbox
 - ✔ Gradient Color Support
 - ✔ and Much More!

## Showcase
![Team Dashboard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c2326721e7c5dbc8a05dda17cf2a45c414a274c.gif)

![Warp Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc162ccd1779df1622338a75cf7ef80636588571.gif)

![Deposit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55a6cbb413888ddc24d50d785d8356edcb09df7e.png)

## Bedrock Support
![PlayerTeam Form Customiable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a36017da2dc68b0a873d4f3634f47020b7bfd7e.png)
**Note: It is Recommeded to used Skin Restorer Plugin for Player Head Avatar**
